svg.title: Simple Chatbot — How It Works, by Shreshtha
svg.desc: An infographic showing the modular architecture and message flow of a Streamlit-based NLP chatbot, created by Shreshtha

g.text: Merge all sources · clean text · strip punctuation · lowercase
Cache to .npy / .pkl so startup is instant next time
Query → vector · cosine similarity vs entire dataset
Best match > 60% confidence threshold → return answer
Renders chat bubbles · holds history in session_state
Context window: last few messages for short follow-ups

svg.text: Confidence threshold: 60% — below this the bot says nothing rather than guess
Smarter bot = more & diverse data in datasets/ folder
